text: Terraform state (`terraform.tfstate`) is a JSON file mapping real-world resources to Terraform configuration. It is the source of truth for Terraform's understanding of infrastructure. Remote state (S3 + DynamoDB locking) is essential for team collaboration.

Terraform state (`terraform.tfstate`) is a JSON file mapping real-world resources to Terraform configuration. It is the source of truth for Terraform's understanding of infrastructure. Remote state (S3 + DynamoDB locking) is essential for team collaboration.
